'''Sareet''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Sareet system/Legends|Sareet system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sareeta]] [[Species/Legends|species]].
